entry.title: Re: 🟢 Tools for Clean ABAP
entry.content:
How does the ABAP Cleaner influence or incorporate with good old formatters like Pretty Printer or the Formatter of Eclipse?
My team consists of old ABAP developers who still develop in SE80 and even older transactions as it was used at 4.6c. Some of them stopped learning 15 years ago but are still doing development stuff.

Am I'm right in saying that once I used ABAP cleaner, Pretty Printer might undo changes, especially indentations?

entry.title: Re: Flexible Workflow Steps and Approval Logic
entry.content:
Hey,

please check how to create approvers via this link: Creating Approvers | SAP Help Portal

Kind regards,

Bart

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: @VijayBhaskarReddyGurrala welcome. Please join the SAP TechEd - SAP Community to share your thoughts. There are Asia Pacific | Location-Based Groups | SAP Community to join too, among many others! Best of luck.

entry.title: Re: Building a docker image of a cds-dk app on a Raspberr...
entry.content: Turned out that building the docker image from the Dockerfile on the RaspberryPi caused the problem. Building it on another machine as a multi-platform docker image, uploding it to a registry, then pulling it onto the Raspberry worked fine. I guess it's more a Docker issue than a @CDS-dk issue

entry.title: Re: Error in creation material master MM01
entry.content:
Hello @DominikTylczyn 

Unable to open the above link. Please guide.

Regards,

Saurabh

Regards,

Saurabh

entry.title: SAP Inside Track Istanbul 2024
entry.content:
This weekend, we had an incredible time with the local community at SAP Inside Track Istanbul 2024! 🚀 It was a full day packed with engaging talks, insightful discussions, and plenty of networking with some of the brightest minds in the SAP ecosystem. We explored innovations across topics like CDS, AMDP, GenAI, Integration Suite, BTP, and more. From deep dives into SAP technologies to conversations on best practices and real-world use cases, we covered a broad spectrum of knowledge and insights.

This year was my first time being involved in organizing SAP Inside Track, and I was so happy to be part of the team bringing it to life! Seeing all the hard work come together and the community’s positive response was truly rewarding.

I want to extend my heartfelt thanks to all our fantastic speakers, who delivered high-quality presentations and shared their expertise. Your contributions were invaluable in making this event both educational and inspiring. 🙏

A massive shoutout to our attendees, who brought an incredible energy that kept the event dynamic and engaging throughout the day. It was wonderful to see so many passionate individuals come together to learn, share, and grow as a community. 

Of course, this event wouldn’t have been possible without the generous support of our sponsor, NTT, who ensured everything ran smoothly. A big thank you as well to SAP Press and Espresso Tutorials for their ongoing support. They’ve always been there for us, providing books and platform access to help our community thrive.

Lastly, we’re already looking forward to coming together again next May for even more knowledge-sharing and innovation! Until then, let’s keep the momentum going and continue to strengthen our incredible local community.

Stay tuned for more update.. I can’t wait for the next SAP Inside Track!

entry.title: Re: Signavio Process Excel Reports - How to See Sequentia...
entry.content:
The report recommended would be the Process Characteristics report with element details.  It is recommended to create one report to see if suits your business scenario. Or you can design Process Documentation with some visualized model as an image as well. If you have more specific questions, please guide create a support case via the link here:  SAP for Me (log in with S-User ID and password).

Kind regards,

Kantrice D

entry.title: Re: Error in creation material master MM01
entry.content:
Hello @DominikTylczyn 

The link is showing No data avaialbale please guide how to access that.

Regards,

Saurabh

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Purchasing a discounted certification attempt
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano 

I’m excited to continue expanding my SAP skills! I’ve completed learning journeys , now looking to further enhance my knowledge.

As I plan to pursue certification, I would greatly appreciate any support, such as a voucher, to assist with this next step. Additionally, I’m curious if there’s a platform where fellow learners and professionals connect? Any guidance on certifications and learning paths would be wonderful as I aim to contribute more to the SAP community and my organization.

entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano 
I’m excited to continue expanding my SAP skills! I’ve completed learning journeys, now looking to further enhance my knowledge.

As I plan to pursue certification, I would greatly appreciate any support, such as a voucher, to assist with this next step. Additionally, I’m curious if there’s a platform where fellow learners and professionals connect? Any guidance on certifications and learning paths would be wonderful as I aim to contribute more to the SAP community and my organization.

entry.title: SAP Android SDK - offline odata - batch CUD operations
entry.content:
Hi experts,

i'm currently using the v24.8.0 of  SAP BTP SDK for Android  with with offline odata

But I can't figure it out how to batch my CUD operations. In the last versions of the SDK, I was using the class OfflineODataRequestOptions and his TransactionId to group them. But now, it doesn't seem to work. 

Is someone knows how to handle this situation ?

Thanks a lot

Yohann

 

OData #offline odata

SAP Mobile Services

entry.title: Re: Purchasing a discounted certification attempt
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano 

I am a recent Software Engineering graduate, eager to expand my expertise in SAP, with a particular focus on becoming an SAP Certified Associate - Data Analyst in SAP Analytics Cloud.

Having successfully completed the learning journeys for "Designing Stories in SAP Analytics Cloud" and "Leveraging SAP Analytics Cloud Functionality for Enterprise Planning," I am now seeking to further enhance my skills and knowledge.

As a gesture of support for this next step, I kindly request a voucher to assist with the certification process. This would not only alleviate financial constraints but also motivate me to continue advancing in this field. I am confident that this will enable me to contribute meaningfully to the SAP community.

Thank you for considering my request, and I look forward to your positive response.

Sincerely,
Eisha Anwar

I am a recent Software Engineering graduate, eager to expand my expertise in SAP, with a particular focus on becoming an SAP Certified Associate - Data Analyst in SAP Analytics Cloud.

entry.title: Re: Developing for Analytics with the SAP BTP ABAP Environment
entry.content:
Hi @AndreasRiehl,

thank you for the excellent videos and posts about the embedded analytics – makes it easier for people who have just explored the transactional RAP-world to find an entry.

I do have a question concerning the on-stack possibilities on a public-cloud system. When creating a transient view entity as CDS-projection, we can expose it to create an InA-service. I got that this service cannot be consumed by fiori-elements and the preferred way probably is the SAC but i do get an excellent preview which could basically serve as an app without having the need to involve the SAC at all.

Is it possible somehow to create a tile that works like the CDS-projection-preview and i'm just missing it?

Kind regards

Mario Lenz

entry.content:

entry.title: Re: SAP BUILD PROCESS AUTOMATION GETTING ERROR 500 IN RBSC PORTAL FOR AGENT UPDATE
entry.content:
Hi Rahul,

I wanted to follow up on the issue you were experiencing with the Desktop Agent Update. Have you been able to resolve it since clicking the Agent Update button?

If you're still encountering problems, please double-check the following steps:

  1. Create a technical user: After clicking the Agent Update button, you should be redirected to the RSBC portal. Click "Add User," enter a name for the technical user, and select "Add User."
  2. Generate a secret ID: Go to the "Users" panel, choose the technical user you created, navigate to the "Strong Cryptography Authentication" section, and select "Generate." Copy the generated secret ID.
  3. Enter credentials: In the Agent Update page, enter the technical user name and the secret ID you copied.
  4. Install Desktop Agent: If you're using an RPA tenant, go to Cloud Factory, select "Configuration," and then "Agent Update." If you're using an SPA tenant, go to "Settings" and then "Agent Update." Choose "Enter Secret ID," enter your technical name, paste the secret ID, and select "Confirm." You can now install Desktop Agent 3 or copy the download link for other users.

If you're still experiencing issues after following these steps, please let me know and we can try to troubleshoot further.

entry.title: Re: SAP PS latest tcode for obsolete T codes
entry.content: Hi thanks for reply. Just wanted to know how can i find sap app corresponding to, lets say CJI3N from Fiori library?

entry.title: Why is my Fiori application no longer working when started from the launchpad (FPS1)?
entry.content:
After upgrading to FPS1, my Fiori application is no longer working, when it is started from the launchpad. Starting it by using its full URL is working fine, but when I run it from the launchpad I get these errors:

Uncaught (in promise) TypeError: this.getRouter().initMaster is not a function
Uncaught (in promise) TypeError: this.getOwnerComponent() is undefined

 I don't get any of them on older system or when the application is hosted on the BTP.

Here is the part of the source code where the errors occur. I can post more if required:


], function (UIComponent, Device, JSONModel, /* ... */) {
"use strict";

/* ... */
return UIComponent.extend("xxx.xxx.Component", {
/* ... */
init: function () {
var mConfig = this.getMetadata().getConfig();

var oParameters = this.getComponentData().startupParameters;
var aUrlParametersForEveryRequest = ["sap-server", "sap-client", "sap-language"];

for (var parameter in oParameters) {
aUrlParametersForEveryRequest.push(parameter);
}

// Create and set the ODataModel
var oModel = models.createODataModel({
urlParametersForEveryRequest: aUrlParametersForEveryRequest,
url: this.getMetadata().getConfig().urlPrefix + this.getMetadata().getConfig().serviceUrl,
config: {
metadataUrlParams: {
"sap-documentation": "heading"
}
},
startUpParams: this.getComponentData().startupParameters
});
this.setModel(oModel);
this._createMetadataPromise(oModel);

// Set the i18n model
this.setModel(models.createResourceModel(mConfig.i18nBundle), "i18n");

// Set the device model
this.setModel(models.createDeviceModel(this.geMode()), "device");

// Set the FLP model
//this.setModel(models.createFLPModel(), "FLP");

// Initialize the error handler with the component
this._oErrorHandler = new ErrorHandler(this);

// Call the base component's init function
UIComponent.prototype.init.apply(this, arguments);

/* ... */

// Create the views based on the url/hash
models.setRouter(this.getRouter());
this.getRouter().initMaster();

What changes do I have to make, so that this application will run on FPS1 system while still being compatible to older systems?

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Istanbul 2024

Thanks for the summary and for sharing all the great pics! It really looks lovely and it's fantastic that you have had the opportunity to be part of it!
Kudos to all organizer!

entry.title: Release of UI5 linter v1.0
entry.content:
UI5 linter is a static code analysis tool for UI5 projects, which was introduced by Oliver Graeff earlier this year in his blog post. After gathering community feedback over the past months and adding further detection features, we are happy to announce the official release of UI5 linter v1.0. 

 

Features 

In this release, UI5 linter can detect the following problems in your UI5 project: 

  • Usage of deprecated UI5 libraries 
  • Usage of deprecated UI5 framework APIs 
  • Usage of global variables 
  • Possible CSP violations 
  • Deprecated component and manifest configurations  

You can control which files should be linted by using include and exclude patterns. By default, UI5 linter will analyze all relevant UI5 resources in your project. This includes JavaScript (or TypeScript) files, XML views, the manifest.json, and the ui5.yaml. 

For a comprehensive list of features in this release, also see our Roadmap: v1.0.0. 

You can find the latest Best Practices for Developers at https://ui5.sap.com/#/topic/28fcd55b04654977b63dacbee0552712 

 

Restrictions 

While UI5 linter already provides many detections, it is not yet covering all aspects and best practices for UI5 2.x. The intention of UI5 linter is to detect as many problems as possible that a project running with UI5 2.x might be facing. However, you’ll still need to test your project with UI5 2.x as soon as it is made available. To reveal additional problems, the UI5 team plans to release more versions of UI5 linter over the next months. 

UI5 linter currently has the following prominent restrictions: 

  • Dynamic usages of deprecated APIs can’t always be detected. Most prominently, when using a construct like "getView().byId()" to retrieve a control instance, UI5 linter is not capable of determining which control class that is, and therefore fails to identify the use of a possibly deprecated API. 
  • UI5 linter does not report the use of private or undocumented UI5 framework APIs. 
  • The use of deprecated APIs in control metadata is not detected. 
  • UI5 linter is unable to analyze UI5 framework APIs that are accessed through a third-party library. 
  • In XML views, the use of globals or deprecated modules in bindings is not detected. 

 

Usage 

Check out https://github.com/SAP/ui5-linter to discover all configuration options. 

Requirements

UI5 linter v1.0 requires Node.js v20.11.0 and higher, or Node.js v22.0.0 and higher (v21 is not supported). 

Installation

Install the CLI using the npm package manager: 

 

npm install --global @ui5/linter

 

 

 

Lint your project

 

 

ui5lint 
 
UI5 linter report: 
 
/application/webapp/controller/App.controller.js 
  10:4 error Call to deprecated function 'attachTap' of class 'Button' 
 
/application/webapp/manifest.json 
  81:17 error Use of deprecated model type 'sap.ui5/models/odata/type="sap.ui.model.odata.ODataModel"'

entry.title: Re: Why is my Fiori application no longer working when st...
entry.content:
Did you invalidated all caches after the upgrade?

Please check 2319491 - How to clean up the cache after applying changes that affect SAP Fiori apps - SAP for Me and https://help.sap.com/docs/CARAB/5f6a0c50ac324b0395738c1ce0fe14c6/ee20517c180e4c3890b8b6c844224cec.html

entry.title: Re: Unable to release sales order using VKM3
entry.content: Please check the Item categories used in Order line items. One of the order item category might be wrong

entry.title: What application is S/4HANA Cloud do I use to view/modify/update "purchasing group" characteristics?
entry.content: I would like to view/modify/update some information for our only purchasing group in S/4HANA. Specifically, we have one "Group 001" that has never been updated but has information like Phone number, Fax, Email, etc. that displays on all of our purchase orders. This information is not valid and, therefore, I would like to update to reflect current state. I've tried searching but can't find out how to make changes. Thank you so much!

entry.title: How to use Parameterized CDS view for Exposed association
entry.content:
Hi,

I am creating a Fiori List report with object page.
If I click on any record from List report it should navigate to object page for that record. But in my case the association to object page is from a Parameterized CDS view.

Below are CDS views

define view entity ZC_MATERIAL_GRP_INVENTORY
    as select from ZI_MATERIAL_GRP_TP2 as a
    association [0..*] to ZC_nav_material_gropping as _gropping on _gropping.Plant = $projection.Plant and 
_gropping.LU = $projection.LU 
{
  key a.MaterialGroupL1L5,
  key a.Plant,
  key a.LU,
      a.MaterialGroup                       as ProductGroup,

      /* Associations */
       _gropping

}

And view ZC_nav_material_gropping has Parameter "p_plusdays"

define view entity ZC_nav_material_gropping
  with parameters
    @EndUserText.label: 'Next Days'
    @Consumption.defaultValue: '14'
    p_plusdays : int1
  as select from ZI_Material_Groupping( p_plusdays: 14 )
{
  key Plant,
  key MaterialGroup                       as ProductGroup,
  key LU,
      CurrentStock,
      some more fields...
}

 

List page is loading correctly but when it navigate to object page it do not show anything:
Below is object page:

 

So, wanted to know how to pass parameter to an exposed association?


Regards,
Prince

entry.title: Re: How to active the deletion flag for material in S/4HA...

entry.title: Re: How to active the deletion flag for material in S/4HA...
entry.content:
Hello @Enda,

Thanks for your screencut. It's helpful. I have a question about the product master data. In s/4hana public cloud, could I active deletion flag in APP "Change material master data"? what's the difference between the material master data and product master data in s/4hana public cloud? 

In ECC, we only use material master data to manage materials across the company. In s/4hana public cloud, why are there both material master data and product master data? What is the purpose of doing this?

Thanks and have a nice day.

BR,

Wendy

entry.title: Re: Discover SAP Business Technology Platform at Spend Connect Live
entry.content: Thank you for sharing @ijoaquin!

entry.title: Re: How to increase length of domain 'SETVAL' from char24->char40?
entry.content: Is table MATERIALID active in your system (link between the 18 and 40 characters material id)

entry.title: Re: Problem Flexible Billing Document Numbering not provi...
entry.content:
We have already identified the problem.

When creating a flexible number range for the ATCUD, the system does not allow you to create an alphanumeric prefix.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/6dbc01446ae14a28b7142bb2203abc10/16500d95345b4baa8631bbad78a41232.html

You must create a number range without a prefix (SSCIU 102819) and assign it to the formula created for flexible numbering (SSCIU 103306).

Once assigned, the series must be created by assigning the number range (SSCIU 180009).

When the series is assigned to the number range, the ADCUD code must be assigned.

entry.title: Re: How to create a service order when there is no billing
entry.content:
Hello,
I believe that what you are looking is not possible. That item category won't be available for those line items.
You can find supported Item Categories in the following site:
Item Categories | SAP Help Portal

For the question related to process the three item categories without invoicing (non-billing), please consider using the Accounting Indicator feature to provide a complete discount to the Service Order Item so that even if its billed, it will still be a Null value one.

Hope this helps.

entry.title: Re: FAGL_IT_02 - Closing/Opening postings at year end
entry.content: helo Sanil Bhandari,

entry.title: Re: FAGL_IT_02 - Closing/Opening postings at year end
Re: S/4 HANA Hybrid Connector - Classic vs New Product co...
entry.content:
Dear Paulo,

as I had already tried to explain in my reply to your post  Re: SAP S/4HANA for Product Compliance: SVT - Issues with..., in the area of Substance Volume Tracking we are currently working together with our customers in the Continuous Customer Engagement sessions on the evaluation of the SVT-specific requirements of various different regulations. The outcome of this work is more on a conceptual level and not suited for a presentation at the Info Days, where we show/demo what new innovations were developed in recent releases. 

As soon as we do have new innovations included in the Substance Volume Tracking solution we will also include the topic substance volume tracking again in the Info Days. 

For our future planning, please refer to the SAP Road Map Explorer - Product Compliance

Best regards,
Michael Schalk (SAP)
Product Manager for Substance Volume Tracking

entry.title: Re: Error in creation material master MM01
entry.content:
Have you Abap authoriztion, else ask an Abaper to exexute SM13 and navigate to the source code.

There is also an icon on previous dynpro to display data received by the FM and so perform some analysis.

entry.title: Issue with Large Data Extraction from SAP B1 via SAP DataSphere: Socket Closed Error
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'd like to briefly explain my current situation and the issue I'm facing.

I'm extracting data from a legacy system (SAP B1) using SAP DataSphere. SAP B1 uses SQL Server, and the connection, including the agent, is working fine, as I have successfully extracted smaller tables without any issues.

However, when I try to extract data from the OCRD table, which contains approximately 500,000 records, the process fails and returns the following message:
Runtime error occurred. See log for more details.
Group messages:
Group: default;
Messages: Graph failure: producer1 failed with the following error: Socket closed.
Process(es) terminated with error(s).

I would greatly appreciate any suggestions or ideas on how to resolve this issue.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: Customer Master creation and extension in S/4 using Migration cockpit (LTMC)
entry.content:
Hi,

Our tasks is to Extensions the Customer & Material Master (Product) via Migration Cockpit Direct Transfer Approach. Has SAP have solution in Direct Transfer Approach. Thanks for reply Arie Landsmann landsmanns@gmail.com Whatsapp +447870211995

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2024 Week 1 Contest Activities
entry.content: Petoberfest is a manual load for the badges.  We don't have anything like the tutorial system that will trigger badge assignment when you post in the community.  The team is working on pulling that data today and hopefully the badges are assigned late today or early tomorrow.

entry.title: Re: Define Pricing Condition Table
entry.content:
Hi Lakshmipathi,

In the upgraded system I can see the different offset value whereas in non-upgraded system differs.

 

Could you please tell me what the difference is for this even checked in V/05 in both systems all same.

entry.title: Re: How can we extract a field as of a specific date in a...
entry.content:
Hi @Konstantina 

There is something I am not understanding in the requirement.

If it is the driver to different bonus plans as you say in the first sentence (which means potentially different weightings between sections etc), why would we only want the value as of one date as you say in the second sentence ? 

We have the point in time feature which retrieves all information from EC as one date but you probably know about this already so I'm guessing it's more complicated than that.

I think maybe it's a phrasing issue and we can chat about it to clarify, unless you can provide an example with actual employee data in this conversation ?

Feel free to send me an invitation for tomorrow Tuesday between 9am and 5 pm Pacific time to discuss.

xavier dot le dot garrec (at) sap dot com

Thanks

Xavier

entry.title: Can I analyze the usage of a web dynpro application?
entry.content: In ST03N, I can analyse the usage of transactions. Is there a similar tool for web dynpro applications? I have an old application and want to find out, if it is still being used...

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Thanks for the give us the opportunity to skill up through Digital Skills Initiative.

I have over 5 years of hands-on experience as an SAP HCM as an end-user, where I have developed a deep understanding of HR processes and SAP system functionality. My role involved managing employee data, processing payroll, and generating comprehensive HR reports.

Currently, I plan to switch to my career as SAP HCM (SuccessFactors ECP) Certified Consultant and eager to learn the SAP Function module.

My experience has equipped me with strong analytical skills, attention to detail, and a solid foundation in SAP HCM and I am confident that my experience will help for SAP certification.

Regards, 
Pratim

entry.title: max users in a team
entry.content:
For a team, is there a max number of users that can be assigned to it?

We have a team that we need to assign all users too, once all assigned it initially looks good but then when going back into the teams section it removes people till there is only 180 left. I wonder if this is a limit but can not see any documentation to confirm this.

entry.title: Re: The Love-Hate Relationship with Networking
entry.content:
Thank you for this thoughtful post about Networking. Unfortunately as you stated, it really is important to your career development.

Although I am an extrovert, I had to intentionally learn how to network once I realized how important it was. 

Years ago I came across this book at a conference. I used to have it on a CD and listen to it in my car on the way to events to boost my confidence. It really did help and the biggest tip I have held on to was to act like a host and try to make others feel comfortable.

Fine Art of Small Talk: How To Start a Conversation, Keep It Going, Build Networking Skills -- and Leave a Positive Impression! 

One other thing that I've started doing recently with virtual meetings is showing up a few minutes early to chat with the other participants as they join. I guess I'm still acting like a host!

entry.title: Re: S_ALR_87013047 with matnr more than 18 digits.
entry.content: Did you 'Customer can also send OSS message to SAP.'

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori List Report Utilizing CDS View with Parameters
entry.content:
Hi @AnkurBajpai ,

I have posted a similar question: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/how-to-use-parameterized-cds-view-for-exposed-association/qaq-p/13883224

But in my case the association entity is parameterized CDS view means when I click on any record on List report object page should open(using association). But here associated entity is cds view with parameter? So, how can I pass parameter values?

entry.title: Change order of budgets in SuccessFactors Compensation Module
entry.content:
Hi all,

we have a client requirement with 4 different budget in the compensation module:

Merit, Target Bonus, Promotion and Overall. Our calculations for each budget works perfectly as per client requirements. 

The system per defult however shows unfortunately the budgets in the following order: 

1. Merit 2. Promotion 3. Overall 4.Target Bonus

Is there a way to configure this display order in the template or via the xml?

@xavierlegarrec @pmacgovern Any ideas?

Thanks! Melina

entry.title: Re: Quedada SAP - post SAP TechEd y Devtoberfest 2024 en Honest Greens Castellana
entry.content: Hi Antonio, The event time is 17:30 for the calendar, the text for 24th says 18:30. "24 de octubre de 2024 a las 18:30 hora local en el Honest Greens de Castellana". Es a las 17:30 o a las 18:30? Abrazo, Phil

entry.title: EBRR: Support for imminent-loss handling for fixed-price customer project - Private Cloud
entry.content:
Dear colleagues,

Event-Based Revenue Recognition: Support for imminent-loss handling for fixed-price customer projects and project-based sales, has been delivered with S/4 Public Cloud 2408.

A French customer of mine has this requirement for the Private Cloud. I am not seeing this in the RoadMap explorer. Do you know if/when this functionality will be available in the Private Cloud?

Thank you,

Christine

entry.title: Re: SAP PS latest tcode for obsolete T codes
entry.content: There isn't a direct replacement for CJI3N. Go into Fiori, App Finder and select the SAP Menu tab and search for CJI3N. It will find it.

entry.title: Re: SAP PS latest tcode for obsolete T codes
entry.content: Right now PS is in a transition phase moving from the old CO tables to the new ACDOCP and ACDOCA. You need to investigate which tables a report uses.

entry.title: Re: Error in creation material master MM01
entry.content: Please refer the below ABAP screen. I am not a ABAPer and unable to understand. Guide me if possible.

entry.title: Re: How to retrieve an attached PDF file that is encoded in Base64 from a mime multipart format emai
entry.content:
def attachments = message.getAttachments();
attachments.values().each{ attachment ->
  def inputStream = attachment.getInputStream();
  def result = new ByteArrayOutputStream();
  def buffer = new byte[1024];
  def length;
    while ((length = inputStream.read(buffer)) != -1) {
        result.write(buffer, 0, length);
     }
  def byteArray = result.toByteArray();
   message.setProperty("attachment_body", byteArray);
}

entry.title: Re: Bug in Access Control SP23?
entry.content: I have the same issue and I checked this note but still it is not resolved.

entry.title: Re: API to get details of purchase order changes in S4 Ha...
entry.content: yes- i am looking for the purchase order changes, like we see data in table CDHDR & CDPOS

entry.title: Re: API to get details of purchase order changes in S4 Ha...
entry.content: yes- i am looking API which will give details similar the table data of CDHDR & CDPOS

entry.title: Re: Release of UI5 linter v1.0
entry.content: Congrats! 🎉 Already used it before the official v1 release, can't wait to see where this goes in the future. Already a very useful tool. 🙂

entry.title: Re: Fields empty After Saving and empty in Executive review
entry.content:
Hi @lindaweiler8 

I would need to have access to the environment to know for sure what is happening but based on the requirement you formulated here is how I would write the formula:

If(geozone="AUT",cust_newmonthlysalary*14,cust_newmonthlysalary*12)

After the condition is what meets the condition and after the second comma it what is always true if the condition isn't met.

All the best

Xavier

entry.title: Re: SAP Business AI Cheat Sheet – Your Quick Reference Guide
entry.content: Very well documented & useful

entry.title: Re: Change order of budgets in SuccessFactors Compensatio...
entry.content:
Hi @Melina512 

Yes you can reorder them but my experience is that it doesn't work by re-ordering them from top to bottom in the UI, it only works if you re-order them from top to bottom in the XML.

make sure the budget-calc as well as the budget labels (2 different places) are in the right order from top to bottom (left to right on worksheet) in the xml then relaunch worksheets.

All the best

Xavier

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Identity Services logon against SAP ECC or S4...
entry.content: This looks like a path forward! Marking this as solution and will give this go. Thank you for the support.

entry.title: Find all WBS element related to a WBS node in a CDS
entry.content:
Hello,

In a CDS, I read another CDS giving me a list of WBS nodes. How could I find all the WBS related to a node. Ex :

I received the node C.00103.1 and get in return C.00103.1.1 and C.00103.1.2.3

C.00103.1

   C.00103.1.1

   C.00103.1.2.3

C.00103.2

   C.00103.2.1 etc

II had a look in table PRHI but it doesn't give what I want.

Thanks in advance

Mat

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
dear Mr. David 

i have an issu (Payment method is not supported, select a different payment method to proceed with order. [18-57CH82FJ] ) when i submit  of Campaign code Can you support me

entry.title: How to load \ ingest .parquet files in SAP PaPM on-premise edition
entry.content:
Hello 

Greetings

Has anyone ingested .parquet file in SAP PaPM on-premise edition. I am aware that there is a 'file adapter' function, but i believe this is only used for ingesting \ loading .csv or .xls file formats only.

If we have to ingest .parquet files in SAP PaPM on-premise edition, then what is the best and the recommended way of doing so?

@JustinAngeles

@emanuele_fumeo 

Thanks

Amogh

entry.title: Re: How to retrieve an attached PDF file that is encoded...
entry.content:
def attachments = message.getAttachments();
attachments.values().each{ attachment ->
  def inputStream = attachment.getInputStream();
  def result = new ByteArrayOutputStream();
  def buffer = new byte[1024];
  def length;
    while ((length = inputStream.read(buffer)) != -1) {
        result.write(buffer, 0, length);
     }
  def byteArray = result.toByteArray();
   message.setProperty("attachment_body", byteArray);
}

entry.title: MD61/MD62/MD63 - Assistance with PIR Quantity Aggregation
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I’ve created my Master Plan in SOP using a daily period bucket and will be transferring the SOP data to Demand Management as PIR. Its getting transferred as "Daily Bucket".

I need to aggregate the PIR quantity into a monthly bucket in MD63. I looked into the Period Total option in User Parameters, but it didn’t meet my needs.

Thank you for your help!

Best regards,
Dinesh Kumar V

entry.title: clientAPI.binding for Android and iOS devices - problems with media files
entry.content:
Hi experts!

I hope you're doing well. I'm currently working on a scenario where users can upload "news" that includes data such as text, title, etc., along with an image. I'm facing a couple of issues and would greatly appreciate any guidance or help.

To give you some context on how I'm handling the news upload:

1.I created a News entity (NOTICIA) that is created using an ODataService.CreateEntity action.

{ "_Type": "Action.Type.ODataService.CreateEntity", "ActionResult": { "_Name": "CrearNoticiaOData" }, "OnFailure": { "Name": "/BTP6S/Actions/GenericMessageBox.action", "Properties": { "Message": "#ActionResults:CrearNoticiaOData/error" } }, "OnSuccess": { "Name": "/BTP6S/Actions/Generic/GenericToastMessage.action", "Properties": { "OnSuccess": "/BTP6S/Actions/ClosePage.action", "Message": "¡Creaste una nueva noticia! Los cambios se verán reflejados al sincronizar." } }, "Target": { "Service": "/BTP6S/Services/xxxxxxxxxx.service", "EntitySet": "NOTICIA" }, "Properties": { "TITULO": "#Control:FormCell_Titulo/#Value", "CUERPO": "#Control:FormCell_Cuerpo/#Value", "AREA_ID": "#Page:Noticias_Crear/#Control:FormCell_AreaId/#SelectedValue", "AUTOR_ID": "#Control:FormCell_AutorId/#SelectedValue" } }

2.After creating the news, I created another entity called NewsMedia (NOTICIAMEDIA), which is uploaded using an ODataService.UploadStream action.

{ "_Type": "Action.Type.ODataService.UploadStream", "ActionResult": { "_Name": "NoticiaMedia_Upload" }, "OnFailure": "/BTP6S/Actions/Noticias/Error.action", "OnSuccess": "/BTP6S/Actions/ClosePage.action", "Target": { "Service": "/BTP6S/Services/xxxxxxxxxxxx.service", "EntitySet": "NOTICIAMEDIA", "QueryOptions": "$filter=NOTICIA_ID eq {NOTICIA/ID}" }, "Properties": { "CONTENIDO": "#Control:FCAttach/#Value" } }

3.Finally, I link the NewsMedia (NOTICIAMEDIA) entity to the respective news (NOTICIA) item using an ODataService.UpdateEntity action.

{ "_Type": "Action.Type.ODataService.UpdateEntity", "ActionResult": { "_Name": "OData_EnlazarNoticiaMedia_Noticia" }, "OnFailure": "/BTP6S/Actions/Error_EnlazarNoticiaMedia.action", "OnSuccess": "/BTP6S/Actions/Noticias/Message_EnlazarNoticiaMedia.action", "Target": { "Service": "/BTP6S/Services/xxxxxxxxxxxxx.service", "EntitySet": "NOTICIA", "QueryOptions": "$filter=ID eq {{#Control:FormCell_NoticiaId/#Value}}" }, "Properties": { "NOTICIAMEDIA_ID": "#Control:FormCell_NoticiaMediaId/#Value" } } 

My Issues:
1. Separate ABMs for Uploading News and Images: I haven't been able to find a solution to allow users to create news and upload an image at the same time using the same ABM. As of now, they must upload the news and the image separately in two different ABMs. Any clarification or advice on how I could combine this process would be highly appreciated.

2. Image Display Issue on Android: When users try to view the news and image on their devices, the image appears fine on iOS devices, but it doesn't show up on Android devices. I'm using an Image control, and for the image field, I call the following rule:

On Android devices, it seems like clientAPI.binding does not include the property CONTENIDO@odata.mediaReadLink, whereas this property is present for iOS users. To make this clearer, I'll attach screenshots of how clientAPI.binding prints on both operating systems.|

For Android devices:

 

 


For iOS devices:

 

 

 

Has anyone encountered this behavior or know of any workarounds?

For additional context, I'm attaching the metadata of my CAP service.

Any guidance, help, or advice would be greatly appreciated!

Additional code:

Page:
{ "Controls": [ { "FilterFeedbackBar": { "ShowAllFilters": false, "_Type": "Control.Type.FilterFeedbackBar" }, "_Type": "Control.Type.SectionedTable", "_Name": "SectionedTable0", "Sections": [ { "EmptySection": { "FooterVisible": false }, "Separators": { "TopSectionSeparator": false, "BottomSectionSeparator": false, "HeaderSeparator": true, "FooterSeparator": true, "ControlSeparator": true }, "_Type": "Section.Type.Image", "_Name": "SectionImage0", "Header": { "_Type": "SectionCommon.Type.Header", "_Name": "SectionCommonTypeHeader0", "AccessoryType": "None", "UseTopPadding": true, "Caption": "{NOTICIA/TITULO}" }, "Visible": true, "Image": "/BTP6S/Rules/VerContenidoImagen.js", "Alignment": "Center", "ContentMode": "ScaleAspectFit" }, { "Separators": { "TopSectionSeparator": false, "BottomSectionSeparator": true, "HeaderSeparator": true, "FooterSeparator": true, "ControlSeparator": true }, "KeyAndValues": [ { "Value": "/BTP6S/Rules/FormatoFecha.js", "_Name": "KeyValue2", "KeyName": "Fecha de publicación", "Visible": true } ], "MaxItemCount": 1, "_Type": "Section.Type.KeyValue", "_Name": "SectionKeyValue2", "Visible": true, "EmptySection": { "FooterVisible": false }, "Layout": { "NumberOfColumns": 2 } }, { "Separators": { "TopSectionSeparator": false, "BottomSectionSeparator": true, "HeaderSeparator": true, "FooterSeparator": true, "ControlSeparator": true }, "KeyAndValues": [ { "Value": "{CUERPO}", "_Name": "KeyValue1", "KeyName": "Desarrollo", "Visible": true } ], "MaxItemCount": 1, "_Type": "Section.Type.KeyValue", "_Name": "SectionKeyValue1", "Visible": true, "EmptySection": { "FooterVisible": false }, "Layout": { "NumberOfColumns": 2 } }, { "Separators": { "TopSectionSeparator": false, "BottomSectionSeparator": true, "HeaderSeparator": true, "FooterSeparator": true, "ControlSeparator": true }, "KeyAndValues": [ { "Value": "/BTP6S/Rules/VerContenidoImagen.js", "_Name": "KeyValue4", "KeyName": "URL Image", "Visible": true } ], "MaxItemCount": 1, "_Type": "Section.Type.KeyValue", "_Name": "SectionKeyValue4", "Visible": true, "EmptySection": { "FooterVisible": false }, "Layout": { "NumberOfColumns": 2 } }, { "Separators": { "TopSectionSeparator": false, "BottomSectionSeparator": true, "HeaderSeparator": true, "FooterSeparator": true, "ControlSeparator": true }, "KeyAndValues": [ { "Value": "/BTP6S/Rules/ShowBinding.js", "_Name": "KeyValue3", "KeyName": "Binding datos", "Visible": true } ], "MaxItemCount": 1, "_Type": "Section.Type.KeyValue", "_Name": "SectionKeyValue3", "Visible": true, "EmptySection": { "FooterVisible": false }, "Layout": { "NumberOfColumns": 2 } }, { "Separators": { "TopSectionSeparator": false, "BottomSectionSeparator": true, "HeaderSeparator": true, "FooterSeparator": true, "ControlSeparator": true }, "Layout": { "LayoutType": "Vertical", "HorizontalAlignment": "Leading" }, "_Type": "Section.Type.ButtonTable", "_Name": "SectionButtonTable0", "Visible": true, "EmptySection": { "FooterVisible": false }, "Buttons": [ { "Styles": { "Button": "MainButton" }, "_Type": "ButtonTable.Type.Button", "_Name": "ButtonTableTypeButton0", "Title": "Me gusta", "Alignment": "Center", "ButtonType": "Text", "Semantic": "Tint", "Image": "sap-icon://heart-2", "ImagePosition": "Leading", "FullWidth": true, "Visible": "/BTP6S/Rules/TieneLike.js", "Enabled": true, "OnPress": "/BTP6S/Rules/HandleNoticia_Like.js" }, { "Styles": { "Button": "MainButton" }, "_Type": "ButtonTable.Type.Button", "_Name": "ButtonTableTypeButton1", "Title": "No me gusta", "Alignment": "Center", "ButtonType": "Text", "Semantic": "Tint", "Image": "sap-icon://heart", "ImagePosition": "Leading", "FullWidth": true, "Visible": "/BTP6S/Rules/NoTieneLike.js", "Enabled": true, "OnPress": "/BTP6S/Rules/HandleNoticia_Like.js" } ] } ] } ], "DesignTimeTarget": { "Service": "/BTP6S/Services/xxxxxxxxxxxxxxx.service", "EntitySet": "NOTICIAPERSONALIKE", "QueryOptions": "$expand=NOTICIA" }, "_Type": "Page", "_Name": "Noticias_Detail", "Caption": "Noticia", "PrefersLargeCaption": true, "ActionBar": { "Items": [ { "_Name": "ActionBarItem0", "Caption": "Editar noticia", "SystemItem": "Edit", "Position": "Right", "IsIconCircular": false, "Visible": true, "OnPress": "/BTP6S/Actions/Noticias/NavTo_NoticiasUpdate.action" } ], "_Name": "ActionBar1" } }

entry.title: User ID generation in Onboarding with external ATS
entry.content:
Our landscape consists of: External ATS -> SuccessFactors Onboarding 2.0 -> SuccessFactors Employee Central.

Within this setup, we are unable to create a rule that enforces the generation of Person ID and User ID following the Employee Central Sequence (it seems that This business rule is honored only when the new hire is onboarded from SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting).

Has anyone found a potential workaround?

entry.title: Re: Substance Volume Tracking Block Purchase Orders S/HAN...
entry.content: Hello Michael,

entry.title: Re: Release of UI5 linter v1.0
entry.content: Agree with @wridgeu, a great tool. Few things missing, but they already on the roadmap or have a open pull request.  Great to apply best practices to a project.

entry.title: Re: How to load \ ingest .parquet files in SAP PaPM on-premise edition
entry.content: Hi Amogh, unfortunately I don't have any experience with PaPM and parquet files. But parquet files are typical data lake files (they were born for Hadoop), therefore volumes could be huge. It might be better to load them directly to the underlying SAP HANA database. If Justine cannot help, you could try involving an SAP HANA expert. Hope it helps

entry.title: PaPM cloud, how to calculate IRR
entry.content:
Hi everybody

In SAP Profitability and Performance Management (PaPM cloud) I need to calculate IRR, I was try to use a RFC function with Python code ussing  IRR fromnumpy_financial library, but unfortunately it's not possible buscause apparently it doesn't support the library.

Somebody knows other ways ussgin python or other function in papm.

 

I apreciate any helps

 

Regards.

 

Juan

entry.title: Re: 🟢 Data Modeling with the latest features of ABAP Core Data Services
entry.content: Wow !!....I was waiting on how did you fill the "tables entity" with the records...since everything is custom.....How is it done?

entry.title: Fiori attachments storage into OpenText archive
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

As Fiori doesn't support Archivelink or GOS feature in most of its apps, we have configured content repository in OACO with storage area as DMS but OpenText core archive as the host. How can we verify the documents uploaded from Fiori apps are uploaded in OpenText archive. 

-After documents are uploaded in Fiori, the source is displayed as DMS (refer attached screenshot), so it is ambiguous the content is stored in which system.

-Which table or where in S/4 system can I check the document is going to OpenText. Unlike in Archivelink tables TOA01, etc, I dont see such doc type, repository information for documents uploaded in Fiori.

-OpenText Core Archive connector simply displays volume details in chart report but no individual document details, that too after 12 hours of upload the report gets refreshed with docs read, written. Logs are on remote server, not straight forward to find a way how to check this when storage area in the repository is DMS but host server is OpenText. 

-Also, has anyone used OpenText Business Object Browser in Fiori? Will it work with ADA license without VIM or would require VIM / xECM license?

Appreciate any inputs or suggestions. Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Declaración de Impuestos para Argentina: ¿Porque es necesario rellenar el campo Reason 0 VAT en
entry.content:
Hola, 

Para agregar info, si necesitan que un documento con IVA cero desde SD (sin Indicador de impuestos específico), determine una razón de IVA cero, existe la siguiente nota: 2964861 - Argentina Tax Reporting (RPFIGLAR_TAXREPORTING): Default 0% VAT Reason from FIARV_TAXID for Accounting Documents Posted through SD

entry.title: How to Automate Datasphere CLI using python
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a requirement to automate the Datasphere CLI using python.

Example: As per the below blog via CLI it's manual activity.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/use-crud-opreations-with-sap-datasphere-command-line-interface/ba-p/13682690

Suppose there is scenario, we have 50 replication flows, i want to update some content in JSON file. Manual Activity takes more time. So by using Python we are able to do it but authentication is blocking for manual intervention. While automate each command it is asking some token code. To streamline this process, please suggest some steps to bypassing the authentication step through automation using Python.

entry.title: Re: SAP Community Meetup Porto
entry.content: Our SAP Meetup was really great! It was a nice event to get to know each other after the SAP CodeJam and before the SAP Inside Track in Porto.

entry.title: index.cds not automatically honored in CAP node.js plugins
entry.content:
I have application (a) and 2 plugins (p1 and p2). In P2's db folder i created a file x.cds that contains an extension

 

extend entity domaind.Bla with {
...additional fields
}
 
also in P2 I reference 
a) p1 in the package.json
b) the file x.cds in an index.cds (that I thought would automatically be used)
 
The problem is that the extensions don't seem to be actively going into effect UNLESS, I specify a using somewhere in my app. 
I was under the impression that if I specify 'index.cds' it will be called and used to possibly define additional services, data models etc. I admit, I might be using plugins different than everybody else at the moment, but wanted to know what the general intent is. 
My work around right now is to simply add 
 
using from '[p2 package name] 
into one of my files in the db folder of the app and that seems to be doing the trick. 
 
So my Question is: Is there a standard .cds file that is honored when a plugin is used? At the moment the only entry point seems to be cds-plugin.js

entry.title: Why Without replenishment lead time not available in Hana after conversion
entry.content: We have recently done ecc to s4 hana conversion (Brown Field). But the without replenishment lead time is not there in new system OVZ9. Any idea.

entry.title: Re: Unable to display USRACL table on S/4 HANA
entry.content: How can we access the data from USRACL considering all authorizations also?

entry.title: ESM support for CAP plugins
entry.content:
I developed a plugin but declared it as type:module in the package.json. 

Once I started using it, it blew up on me. After some debugging i found this in 'sap/cds/lib/plugin.js'

// TODO: support ESM plugins. But see cap/cds/pull/1838#issuecomment-1177200 !
 
Can I suggest adding something to the CAP documentation a) to let people know that ESM modules are not supported as plugins at the moment and b) is there an ETA when you are planning to do so?

entry.title: Re: A problem occurred while checking the system health (NO_RESPONSE)
entry.content: SAP Desktop Agent needs to be installed to resolve the issue. Refer OSS - 3202981

entry.title: Re: A problem occurred while checking the system health (...
entry.content: SAP Desktop Agent needs to be installed to resolve the issue. Refer OSS - 3202981

entry.title: Need a way to access the contents of a table via a program on S/4HANA 2023
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Due to changes in Module "VIEW_AUTHORITY_CHECK" in latest release S/4HANA 2023 (on-premise), we are unable to pass authority check for table USRACL via program. We get an exception "INVALID_ACTION" on S/4HANA 2023, though any lower S/4 release passes the authority check properly.

Please let us know any alternate way of accessing this table.

Regards,

Bhavya

entry.title: Re: Need: Access to SAP Signavio Process Governance (30-d...
entry.content:
Hello Wilko,

Do you know if there´s any news regarding this, I have hit the same wall.

Thanks a lot in advance!

Best regards,

Jessé

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello SAP World,

I am grateful of the SAP Community for giving an opportunity to me to upskill my SAP skills , i want to apply under the category of "First generation college students" , as having a SAP certification would help me to start by aspiring SAP Career.

Thanks again to @David_Chaviano  and @KatherineKenneally for it.

Regards

Sachin Dabas

entry.title: Re: How to load \ ingest .parquet files in SAP PaPM on-pr...
entry.content:
Thanks for your quick response @emanuele_fumeo 

I agree with your comments on the volumes and shall check with my HANA expert.

Another option I was thinking is to get this data from datalake into HANA DB via Integration Suite / CI (as our HANA DB is hosted in BTP)  but my doubt is can the PaPM on premise edition read the data from this BTP hosted HANA DB via SDA using a Model HANA view?

entry.title: unable to open attachment in the invoice in PDF
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are use ECC 6.0

one of my team member while trying to open the attachment in the invoice it is displayed and disappear in 2 secs.

but when i tried i can open the attachment in the PDF. is it a role missing issue or and settings need to be changed ?  please help if you have gone through this type of issue before.

steps we followed to open attachment are below:

1. opened purchase order and click on invoice. now invoice opened.

2. go to systems and click on services for object and click on the icon that opens the attachment.

for me getting a pop up to open/save the attachment like below, but for my team member it is not coming.

 

please help.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Disable Custom Field in VA02
entry.content: Hi!!! Any news about this issue?

entry.title: Re: 🟢 The Art & Science of CAP
entry.content: looking forward to the followup session
